chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-389 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on CMA 7036/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For hearing of main case 21-10-2025 **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2&3. Mr. Ali Akbar Gopang, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Shahid Ali K. Memon, counsel for petitioners and under his instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
